name: dantecode
description: DanteCode MCP server — DanteForge quality gates, verification pipeline, memory, automation, and developer tools exposed as MCP tools.

tools.name: pdse_score
tools.description: Run PDSE quality scoring on a code string. Returns completeness, correctness, clarity, consistency scores and violations.

tools.name: anti_stub_scan
tools.description: Scan code for stubs, placeholders, TODOs, FIXMEs, empty functions, and type:any violations.

tools.name: constitution_check
tools.description: Check code for constitutional violations: credential exposure, background processes, dangerous operations.

tools.name: lessons_query
tools.description: Query the lessons database for recorded patterns and corrections relevant to a file or language.

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search the project code index using TF-IDF or hybrid semantic search when embeddings are available.

tools.name: record_lesson
tools.description: Record a success, failure, or preference lesson so future runs can learn from the pattern.

tools.name: autoforge_verify
tools.description: Run the DanteForge verification pipeline across a task or project and return a compact result summary.

tools.name: verify_output
tools.description: Run the multi-stage QA harness against a task output and return PDSE-style metrics, critique trace, and rail findings.

tools.name: run_qa_suite
tools.description: Run the QA harness across multiple outputs for a plan or batch and return an aggregate pass/fail report.

tools.name: critic_debate
tools.description: Aggregate critic or sub-agent verdicts into a consensus decision with blocking findings.

tools.name: add_verification_rail
tools.description: Register a runtime output verification rail so subsequent verification calls apply the guard automatically.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using DanteCode's intelligent multi-provider orchestrator with persistent caching.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and extract clean markdown or structured JSON using the DanteCode Smart Extractor pipeline.

tools.name: smart_extract
tools.description: Intelligently extract specific information from a webpage based on a goal.

tools.name: batch_fetch
tools.description: Fetch multiple URLs concurrently with common extraction instructions.

tools.name: spawn_subagent
tools.description: Spawn a dynamic, role-specialized sub-agent for parallel or isolated task execution with worktree support.

tools.name: git_watch
tools.description: Start, list, or stop durable Git event watchers for post-commit, pre-push, branch-update, and file-change events.

tools.name: run_github_workflow
tools.description: Executes a local GitHub-style workflow file with event payload injection, matrix expansion, and persisted run metadata.

tools.name: auto_pr_create
tools.description: Automatically create a pull request from current branch changes with AI-generated description.

tools.name: webhook_listen
tools.description: Start a local webhook listener for external event integration.

tools.name: schedule_git_task
tools.description: Schedule a recurring git-based task with cron syntax.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a persistent memory entry associated with the current session.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Recall relevant memories using semantic similarity search.

tools.name: memory_summarize
tools.description: Summarize and compact older memory entries to free context window budget.

tools.name: memory_prune
tools.description: Prune stale or irrelevant memory entries based on age and access frequency.

tools.name: cross_session_recall
tools.description: Recall memories from prior sessions to provide continuity across conversations.

tools.name: memory_visualize
tools.description: Visualize the trace and entity map of the persistent memory.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run the project test suite using the configured test runner and return a pass/fail summary with failure details.

tools.name: get_coverage
tools.description: Return test coverage metrics (statements, branches, functions, lines) for a project or specific package.

tools.name: analyze_error
tools.description: Analyze a TypeScript/JavaScript error or stack trace to identify root cause and suggest targeted fixes.

tools.name: suggest_fix
tools.description: Given a failing test output or error, suggest a concrete code fix with the minimal change required.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available DanteCode skills with their names, descriptions, and activation status.

tools.name: get_session_history
tools.description: Retrieve recent session history including tasks completed, files modified, and PDSE scores.

tools.name: run_benchmark
tools.description: Run a DanteForge competitive benchmark against a task and return a score report with dimension-level ratings.

tools.name: get_token_usage
tools.description: Return current session token usage, context window utilization percentage, and budget tier.
